business_ideas.idea: B2B trade show business - niche industry events (automotive testing, aircraft interiors, health care)
Thinking Time - Slack app for asynchronous decision-making using Delphi method with anonymity

predictions.text: B2B trade shows consistently sell for 10-15x profit, triple Ecom valuations, outlast most businesses
Great orators and charismatic speakers can persuade people toward false beliefs more than logic arguments
Tallest/fittest people at events attract disproportionate attention regardless of actual business accomplishments
